name: Sugared Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F. Grease bottoms of 12 medium muffin cups.
2. Stir Corn Bread Mix, water, brown sugar and egg just until mix is moistened. Batter will be lumpy.
3. Fold in blueberries. Fill muffin cups 2/3 full.
4. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
5. Mix granulated sugar and cinnamon. Dip tops of muffins into butter, then into the sugar-cinnamon mixture.
